verified_oracles.identity: Skein_Link_1 = Compose_Link(Sum(ConnectedSum(VerticalSmooth, Compose_Link(DisjointUnion(q, q), UnderCrossing)), Sum(HorizontalSmooth, Invariant(Multiply_Scalar(q, Unknot)))), OverCrossing)

UnderCrossing = ConnectedSum(UnderCrossing, Multiply_Scalar(ConnectedSum(DisjointUnion(DisjointUnion(Unknot, Unknot), Twist(q)), q_inv), Add(DisjointUnion(Twist(q), HorizontalSmooth), Sum(Twist(Unknot), Unknot))))
